installCommand: amazon-linux-extras install dart -y || (curl --location --silent --fail https://storage.googleapis.com/dart-archive/channels/stable/release/latest/linux_packages/dart_stable.x86_64.rpm -o dart.rpm && yum install -y ./dart.rpm)
buildCommand: dart pub global activate jaspr_cli && dart pub get && $HOME/.pub-cache/bin/jaspr build
